messages.content: I have an asp.net core mvc .NET 6 project, write me a code to add custom tables to the auto-generated db.

Create a landing page that displays Handy man services. The UX should be minimum because most visitors are constuction workers. The page will consist of a header, Hero Section, Who are we Section, Services Section, Contact Us Section ( in the shape of a footer ). The header will contain an a href for each section and when you click on one of them it automatically scrolls down to this section. Also the services section will consist of cards, Each row will contain 3 cards on larger screens while only displaying 1 card per row on mobile, each card contains a Title for the service, an image, a brief description, a phone number with whatsapp icon on the left side and hidden keywords for SEO. The page will be responsive using tailwindcss. We need the Hero Section to consist of 2 parts, a text Carousel on one side and an image on the other side in a neat way. The design has to be minimalistic and appealing. Use constuction-like colors for the pallette.

I will provide you with the HTML and Tailwind CSS code for the landing page, and you can adjust it as needed. Note that you'll need to have Tailwind CSS set up in your project or linked from a CDN. Here's the code for the landing page: ```html Handyman Services
Home Who We Are Services Contact Us

Carousel text 1

Carousel text 2

Carousel text 3

Who We Are

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Praesent in consectetur urna, id bibendum quam. Cras id sapien mi. Mauris tristique sollicitudin mauris, non fermentum orci finibus ut. Mauris dapibus odio metus, eget commodo sem bibendum ut.

Services

Service Title

Service description lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

+1 (234) 567-890

Contact Us

Email: example@example.com

Phone: +1 (234) 567-890

Address: 1234 Construction Lane, Builder City, CA

``` This template provides a basic structure using Tailwind CSS classes for styling. You will need to replace the image sources, text, and other information with your own content. If you would like to implement smooth scrolling using JavaScript, add this script to your HTML file before the closing `` tag: ```html ``` This will make the navigation links smoothly scroll down to the corresponding sections when clicked.

About the custom tables, i ran this: dotnet ef migrations add Adds --context ApplicationDbContext
and got this error:
dotnet : Could not execute because the specified command or file was not found.
At line:1 char:1
+ dotnet ef migrations add Adds --context ApplicationDbContext
+ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    + CategoryInfo          : NotSpecified: (Could not execu... was not found.:String) [], RemoteException
    + FullyQualifiedErrorId : NativeCommandError
 
Possible reasons for this include:
  * You misspelled a built-in dotnet command.
  * You intended to execute a .NET program, but dotnet-ef does not exist.
  * You intended to run a global tool, but a dotnet-prefixed executable with this name could not be found on the PATH.

It seems that the Entity Framework Core tools are not installed or not added to the `PATH`. You can install the Entity Framework Core tools as a global tool using the following command:

```
dotnet tool install --global dotnet-ef
```

After you've installed the tool, try running the migration command again:

```
dotnet ef migrations add Adds --context ApplicationDbContext
```

If you still get the same error, ensure that the `PATH` environment variable includes the global tools installation folder. The default location for global tools is:

- For Windows: `%USERPROFILE%\.dotnet\tools`
- For macOS/Linux: `$HOME/.dotnet/tools`

You can add the location to the `PATH` by following the instructions for your operating system:

1. Windows:

   - Press `Win + X` and select System (Control Panel).
   - Click on Advanced system settings in the left sidebar.
   - Select the 'Environment Variables...' button.
   - Under 'System Variables', locate the 'Path' variable, click Edit.
   - Add `%USERPROFILE%\.dotnet\tools` to the end of the list (separated by a semicolon).

2. macOS/Linux:

   - Open the Terminal.
   - Open `~/.bash_profile` or `~/.bashrc` or `~/.zshrc` (depending on your shell) in a text editor. Create the file if it doesn't exist.
   - Add `export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet/tools"` to the file.
   - Save the file and restart the Terminal.

After updating the `PATH`, try running the migration command again.

Make the landing page above suitable for SEO, use h1,2,3,4 and add alt to images and manage keywords for "Services Section" cards. and make all necessary changes. and tell me what else i should be doing to get on google search first page.

I've updated the HTML code for the landing page to include SEO improvements like using different heading levels (`h1`, `h2`, `h3`, `h4`) as well as adding `alt` attributes to the images. I've also included the usage of SEO keywords for the "Services Section" cards, which can be easily modified. ```html Handyman Services
Home Who We Are Services Contact Us

Handyman Services

Carousel text 1

Carousel text 2

Carousel text 3

Who We Are

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Praesent in consectetur urna, id bibendum quam. Cras id sapien mi. Mauris tristique sollicitudin mauris, non fermentum orci finibus ut. Mauris dapibus odio metus, eget commodo sem bibendum ut.

Services We Offer

Service Title

Service description lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

+1 (234) 567-890

Contact Us

Email: example@example.com

Phone: +1 (234) 567-890

Address: 1234 Construction Lane, Builder City, CA

``` Besides these changes, to further improve your chances of ranking on the first page of Google search results, consider the following suggestions: 1. Create high-quality, original content. Google prioritizes content that is informative, engaging, and adds value to users. 2. Optimize your website's performance. Ensure that your site loads quickly and is mobile-friendly, as Google takes page speed and mobile usability into account when ranking websites. 3. Use heading tags properly (`h1`, `h2`, `h3`, etc.) to structure your content. 4. Set up a sitemap.xml file and submit it to Google Search Console to help search engines crawl and index your site's pages. 5. Build a strong backlink profile by earning backlinks from authoritative, relevant sites. 6. Use structured data (such as JSON-LD or Microdata) to provide more information to search engines and improve your chances of being displayed in rich search results. 7. Register your business with Google My Business to improve the visibility of your website in local searches. 8. Keep track of changes in SEO best practices and update your website accordingly. Please note that reaching the first page of Google search results is extremely competitive. Consistently executing these best practices gives you the best chance of improving your website's rankings over time.
Set up a sitemap.xml for the landing page you just created. this is the domain name: "http://elctronicads.com/"

To create a sitemap.xml file for the landing page, you can use the following content as a starting point:

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">
  <url>
    <loc>http://elctronicads.com/</loc>
    <lastmod>2023-02-22</lastmod>
    <changefreq>monthly</changefreq>
    <priority>1.0</priority>
  </url>
</urlset>
```

Replace `<lastmod>` with the date of the last modification you made to the landing page (in the format yyyy-mm-dd).

The sitemap.xml file should be placed in the root directory of your website. If you are hosting your site with a provider that gives you direct access to the server, simply upload the sitemap.xml file to the root directory (the same directory that holds the index.html file). If you're using GitHub Pages or a similar service, you can add the sitemap.xml file to the main branch of your repository, and it will be served from the root directory.

Once the sitemap.xml file is set up, you should submit the sitemap to Google through Google Search Console:

1. [Sign in to Google Search Console](https://search.google.com/search-console/welcome).
2. Select your website or add it if it's not already in the console.
3. Click on "Sitemaps" from the left sidebar menu.
4. Enter "sitemap.xml" in the "Add a new sitemap" field.
5. Click "Submit".

This will help Google crawl and index your site more effectively.
Make an arabic rtl version of the landing page you created.

To create an Arabic RTL version of the landing page template, you will need to adjust the text direction and update the text to Arabic content. Here's an example of the HTML code: ```html خدمات الصيانة
الرئيسية من نحن الخدمات تواصل معنا

خدمات الصيانة

نص الدوران 1

نص الدوران 2

نص الدوران 3

من نحن

لوريم إيبسوم هو ببساطة نص شكلي (بمعنى أن الغاية هي الشكل وليس المحتوى) ويُستخدم في صناعات المطابع ودور النشر. كان لوريم إيبسوم ولايزال المعيار للنص الشكلي منذ القرن الخامس عشر عندما قامت مطبعة مجهولة برص مجموعة من الأحرف بشكل.

خدماتنا

عنوان الخدمة

وصف الخدمة لوريم إيبسوم دولور سيت أميت, إيليت آد بوسويري جرافيدا فولوتبات روتروم.

+1 (234) 567-890

تواصل معنا

البريد الإلكتروني: example@example.com

هاتف: +1 (234) 567-890

العنوان: 1234 شارع البناء, مدينة البناء, كاليفورنيا

``` Please note that I used Google Translate to provide Arabic translations for the template text. You should update the text content with proper translations for a more accurate representation. Keep in mind that this RTL version uses the same Tailwind CSS stylesheet as the original version. Tailwind CSS doesn't automatically flip its styles for RTL languages by default. However, this simple example should appear correctly for RTL languages. For handling more complex cases, consider using a package like [Tailwind CSS RTL](https://github.com/20lives/tailwindcss-rtl) to generate RTL-specific styles.
make the transition to each section run smoothly
write an html code to make a similar effect to a carousel, First make it write the text of the first item, when it's done writing it slides to the next text and does the same.
The code is not working, the html page is displaying all of them at once and they're static. "Carousel text 1 Carousel text 2 Carousel text 3"
it does the typing animation on the first item only, I need it to type the first item, fade it out, and then start typing the second item, fade it out.. etc
They all fade normally except for the first item, it stays there while the animation is running on the other items
